data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story DD Coverage
This task satisfies:
- DD1: Linux-only CI job exporting BASH_OPTS='-eo pipefail' runs the test suite on every PR
- DD2: Job emits stable check-context name for inclusion in Ruleset

## Description
Add a `tests-pipefail-strict` job to plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml.

The job:
- runs-on: ubuntu-latest (Linux-only by runner selection)
- needs: [lint-format] (sibling of the standard tests job, positioned after lint)
- Exports BASH_OPTS='-eo pipefail' as a job-level env var
- Uses ${{ vars.DSO_TEST_CMD }} (same as the standard tests job)
- Includes a pre-flight check that exits 1 if DSO_TEST_CMD is unset
- Has NO continue-on-error (per adversarial review: job must fail loudly, not theatrically pass)
- Has a stable job id `tests-pipefail-strict` which GitHub Actions uses as the check-context name

### Job structure to add to ci-dso-staged.yml (after the tests job):

```yaml
  tests-pipefail-strict:
    needs: [lint-format]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    env:
      BASH_OPTS: "-eo pipefail"
      SUITE_TEST_INDEX: ${{ github.workspace }}/.test-index
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Check required variables are configured
        run: |
          if [ -z "$DSO_TEST_CMD" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Required GitHub Actions Variable DSO_TEST_CMD is not set." >&2
            echo "Configure it in your repository or organization settings." >&2
            exit 1
          fi
        env:
          DSO_TEST_CMD: ${{ vars.DSO_TEST_CMD }}

      - name: Run tests (Linux-strict pipefail)
        run: ${{ vars.DSO_TEST_CMD }}
```

### Header comment update
Update the template header to note that `tests-pipefail-strict` uses DSO_TEST_CMD.

### IMPORTANT: Deployment guidance
This job ships as NOT required in the Ruleset initially. Consumer must:
1. Observe whether tests-pipefail-strict fails in their project
2. File fix-bug tickets for any SIGPIPE-class failures found
3. Add to Ruleset's required-check list ONLY after the job is consistently green

Add this guidance as a YAML comment in the template above the job.

### Rollout note
The template REVIEW-DEFENSE comment should note that test_pipefail_strict_job_exists is tested by tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh passes (PASSED: N FAILED: 0)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh && echo OK
- [ ] tests-pipefail-strict job present in plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
  Verify: grep -q 'tests-pipefail-strict' plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
- [ ] BASH_OPTS env var set to -eo pipefail in the job
  Verify: grep -A5 'tests-pipefail-strict' plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml | grep -q 'pipefail'
- [ ] No continue-on-error in the tests-pipefail-strict job
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml')); assert 'continue-on-error' not in d['jobs']['tests-pipefail-strict'], 'continue-on-error found'"
- [ ] ruff check passes (skip if no .py files modified)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml — MODIFY (add tests-pipefail-strict job)

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
data.title: Add tests-pipefail-strict job to ci-dso-staged.yml template
